g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the AI engine process a user query before searching?')
sendPrompt('How does BM25 lexical matching work in search?')
sendPrompt('What is approximate nearest neighbour search in embedding retrieval?')
sendPrompt('How does a cross-encoder reranker differ from a bi-encoder?')
sendPrompt('How does RAG grounding work during LLM generation?')
sendPrompt('What makes a content section get cited by an AI answer engine?')

svg.text: How major platforms implement this pipeline

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Perplexity AI retrieve and rank content?')
sendPrompt('How does Google AI Overviews select content to cite?')
sendPrompt('How does ChatGPT Search retrieve content when browsing?')

svg.text: The unit of optimization shifts from full pages → individual passages
Matching shifts from keywords → semantic embedding proximity + cross-encoder verification
Content is retrieved at sub-document granularity — a buried paragraph can surface above a poorly-structured page
